ogTitle: Lismore Heights vs Lithgow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lismore Heights and Lithgow.
heading: Lismore Heights vs Lithgow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lismore Heights, New South Wales and Lithgow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lithgow has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Lismore Heights (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lismore Heights or Lithgow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lismore Heights has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Lithgow scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lismore Heights scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Lithgow scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lismore Heights or Lithgow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lithgow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
